output.notes: Use this subscription payload with a webhook relay worker that polls Sablier events and POSTs to webhookUrl.
Configure webhook URL and secret in Request Finance dashboard > Settings > Developer > Apps. Then verify X-Webhook-Signature in your webhook handler.
Use this subscription payload with a long-lived worker that streams XMTP inbox messages and POSTs matching payment intents to webhookUrl.
Configure webhook signing in Persona dashboard and verify HMAC-SHA256 signatures in your webhook handler before processing events.
